description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pymnn-macos that runs on push to master, feature/* branches, and on pull requests to master, but only for paths under pymnn/ and .github/workflows/pymnn_macos.yml. The workflow should run on macos-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python 3.8.10, installing numpy, opencv-python, and torch, then building and testing pymnn under these conditions, cancelling any in-progress runs for the same ref.
